code: import React from'react';import{escapeHtml}from'../utils/helpers';import'./AppointmentCard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AppointmentCard=_ref=>{let{appointment,userRole,onComplete}=_ref;const statusClass=appointment.status==='completed'?'status-completed':appointment.status==='cancelled'?'status-cancelled':'status-booked';return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"appointment-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"appointment-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"appointment-date-time",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"appointment-date",children:escapeHtml(appointment.appointment_date)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"appointment-time",children:escapeHtml(appointment.appointment_time)})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`status-badge ${statusClass}`,children:escapeHtml(appointment.status)})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"appointment-body",children:[appointment.doctor_name&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Doctor:"})," ",escapeHtml(appointment.doctor_name)]}),appointment.patient_name&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Patient:"})," ",escapeHtml(appointment.patient_name)]})]}),userRole==='doctor'&&appointment.status==='booked'&&onComplete&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"appointment-actions",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-complete",onClick:()=>onComplete(appointment.id),children:"Mark Completed"})})]});};export default AppointmentCard;
